MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION IS DENIED. A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT EXISTS WHETHER AS OF JANUARY 31, 2015 PLAINTIFF'S PAYMENTS WERE THE EQUIVALENT OF FULL THREE MONTHS PAYMENTS BEHIND. FURTHER, DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN RE: BEING LIABLE UNDER 2012 HAMP MODIFICATION AGREEMENT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS FRAMED BY THE PLEADINGS. PLAINTIFF CLEARLY ASSERTS THE BASIS FOR DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY AS SUCCESSOR TO THE ORIGINAL CONTRACTING PARTY (FOURTH AMENDED COMPLAINT ATTACHMENT BC-1 1:14-17). DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE ANY FACTS OR EVIDENCE ON THIS ISSUE OTHER THAT POINTING OUT THAT IT WAS NOT THE SIGNATORY TO THE CONTRACT, AN ARGUMENT NOT ADVANCED OR PURSUED BY THE PLAINTIFF. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO ALL OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. THESE CAUSES OF ACTION, AS ALLEGED, ARISE OUT OF EVENTS OCCURRING IN OCTOBER 2014-JANUARY 2015, MORE SPECIFICALLY ALLEGED AGREEMENTS REACHED/PROMISES MADE IN DECEMBER 2014. IT IS UNDISPUTED THAT PLAINTIFF DID NOT COMPLY WITH AT LEAST ONE OF THE TERMS OF SUCH AGREEMENTS, I.E. DID NOT MAKE A PAYMENT DUE ON FEBRUARY 1, 2015. WHILE THIS PAYMENT MAY BE IRRELEVANT (AS ASSERTED BY PLAINTIFF, BUT NOT DECIDED BY THE COURT AT THIS TIME) TO THE 2012 HAMP CAUSE OF ACTION, IT IS AN ADMITTED TERM OF THE ALLEGED CONTRACT/PROMISE, WHICH HAS NOT BEEN COMPLIED WITH. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant Select Portfolio Servicing, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

James Fahey, Petitioner in Properia Persona. 415-845-6507, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Bryan Hawkins, Esq. of Stoel Rives LLP, 916-447-0700, appearing for Select Portfolio, Defendant and moving party.

Hearing is held. James read a prepared statement aloud to the Court. Mr. Hawkins had no further argument.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant Select Portfolio Servicing, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Motion for Summary Adjudication of the First cause of action is DENIED. A triable issue of fact exists whether as of January 31, 2015 Plaintiff's payments were the equivalent of full three months payments behind. Further, Defendant failed to shift the burden re: being liable under 2012 HAMP Modification Agreement. Motion for Summary Adjudication is framed by the pleadings. Plaintiff clearly asserts the basis for Defendant's liability as successor to the original contracting party (Fourth Amended Complaint Attachment BC-1 1:14-17). Defendant failed to provide any facts or evidence on this issue other that pointing out that it was not the signatory to the contract, an argument not advanced or pursued by the Plaintiff.

Motion for Summary Adjudication is GRANTED as to all other causes of action. These causes of action, as alleged, arise out of events occurring in October 2014-January 2015, more specifically alleged agreements reached/promises made in December 2014. It is undisputed that Plaintiff did not comply with at least one of the terms of such agreements, i.e. did not make a payment due on February 1, 2015. While this payment may be irrelevant (as asserted by Plaintiff, but not decided by the Court at this time) to the 2012 HAMP cause of action, it is an admitted term of the alleged contract/promise, which has not been complied with. Order for the same signed in open court.Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
